# New One Touch

> Manufacturer of industrial food processing machines and equipment — atta mixers, masala mixers, roti machines, namkeen makers, dhokla steamers, juicers and more.

New One Touch supplies quality stainless-steel food processing machinery for commercial and industrial kitchens across India. Products are available in multiple capacities with detailed specifications (model number, motor, weight, size, GST).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured machines, categories and new arrivals.
- [All Products](/products): Browse the full catalogue of food processing machines.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse machines by type (atta mixing, roti, namkeen, etc.).
- [About](/profile/about): About New One Touch Automation.
- [Contact](/profile/contact): Phone, email and address.

## Optional

- [Terms](/profile/terms): Terms & conditions.
- [Privacy](/profile/privacy): Privacy policy.
